templates.name: Code Hike
templates.props_hint: code: string[], highlightLine: int, annotationText: str, language: str

templates.name: TikTok Captions
use_when: a short punchy phrase should land word by word
a memorable one-liner in the script

templates.name: Audiogram
use_when: quote from episode with speaker attribution
templates.props_hint: audioFile: str, quote: str, podcastName: str, niche: str

templates.name: Music Visualization
templates.props_hint: same as Audiogram — bars are audio-reactive via useAudioData

templates.name: 3D
use_when: abstract b-roll background for DS niche (3D network graph)
abstract b-roll background for Life niche (3D particle field)
abstract b-roll background for Poetry niche (3D aurora particles)
templates.props_hint: no scene-plan props — used as background only

templates.name: Render Server
use_when: batch render trigger from Python scripts
templates.props_hint: infrastructure — POST /render and POST /still at localhost:3001

templates.name: Stills
templates.props_hint: infrastructure — triggered by export_social_cards.py via render server

templates.name: Overlay
use_when: outro card with up-next and subscribe

templates.name: Next.js + Shadcn
use_when: scaffolding — Next.js + Shadcn UI + Remotion starter

templates.name: React Router 7
use_when: scaffolding — React Router 7 + Remotion project starter

templates.name: Electron
use_when: scaffolding — Electron desktop app with Remotion renderer
templates.props_hint: desktop only — not used in web render pipeline

templates.name: Skia
use_when: hand-drawn feel for poetry or life niche
templates.props_hint: lines: str[], niche: str — requires @remotion/skia native dependency

templates.name: Stargazer
use_when: GitHub stars timeline visualization — not relevant to content niches

templates.name: Prompt to Video
use_when: AI prompt → Remotion animation — future CustomScene pipeline input

templates.name: Prompt to Motion Graphics
use_when: AI prompt → complex motion graphics — advanced CustomScene pipeline

templates.name: Recorder
use_when: talking-head recording for Life and Poetry niche videos
webcam capture with Whisper auto-transcription and caption export
templates.props_hint: standalone app — setup: cd recorder && npx create-video@latest . (choose Recorder) — see recorder/SETUP.md

scene_components.use_when: citing a number, stat, comparison, or data trend
scene_components.props: title: str, data: [{label: str, value: number}], chartType: 'bar'|'line'|'number'

scene_components.use_when: showing or explaining a code snippet, function, or syntax
scene_components.props: code: str[], language: str, highlightLine: int, annotationText: str

scene_components.use_when: introducing a term, concept, or framework the viewer may not know
scene_components.props: headline: str, cards: [{term: str, definition: str, icon?: str}]

scene_components.use_when: comparing two approaches, tools, libraries, or strategies side by side
scene_components.props: leftSide: {label: str, points: str[]}, rightSide: {label: str, points: str[]}

scene_components.use_when: listing 3-5 steps, rules, principles, or tips
scene_components.props: title: str, tips: [{number: int, headline: str, body?: str}]

scene_components.use_when: describing a before/after shift, problem/solution, or growth story
scene_components.props: beforeLabel: str, afterLabel: str, beforePoints: str[], afterPoints: str[], transformLabel?: str

scene_components.use_when: describing a cycle, feedback loop, or recurring system or process
a short powerful phrase, key term, or memorable line should land hard
scene_components.props: words: str[], emphasis: int[] (optional, 0-based indices to bold)

scene_components.use_when: a full-screen quote, thesis statement, poem title, or poetic moment
a poem, verse, lyric, or multi-line revelation should appear line by line
the speaker cites a specific number, stat, percentage, count, or metric — animate it counting up to land the number visually
scene_components.props: value: number, label: str, prefix?: str (e.g. '$', '#'), suffix?: str (e.g. '%', 'x', 'k')

scene_components.use_when: a narrative peak, emotional beat, or cinematic moment — full-screen atmospheric image with a bold headline anchored at bottom; use imageUrl when a relevant visual exists, omit for gradient-only mode
scene_components.props: headline: str, imageUrl?: str (local path or URL), subtext?: str (eyebrow label above headline)

scene_components.use_when: a poem verse, emotional quote, or lyrical line should feel handcrafted — text reveals line by line with an animated underline stroke drawn via Skia canvas
scene_components.props: lines: str[] (max 4), niche: str — life or poetry; stroke draws under each line in staggered sequence

scene_components.use_when: no existing component fits — generate a one-off scene with: python3 scripts/generate_custom_scene.py --name MyComponent --prompt '<description>' --niche ds|life|poetry
scene_components.props: determined by generated component — review output file for interface
